product_name: Star Wars: The Arcade Game Cartridge (Atari 8-Bit Computer)
condition_notes: The wireframe trench run that emptied pockets in 1983, brought home to the computer. Star Wars: The Arcade Game (Parker Brothers, Atari 8-bit) on its silver label — one of the more desirable Atari computer titles. Loose, used, untested; from a single-owner estate collection. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is.
